id.description: A unique identifier for the chat completion.

created.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the completion was created.

model.description: The model used for the chat completion.

choices.description: A list of chat completion choices.

system_fingerprint.description: This fingerprint represents the backend configuration that the model runs with. Can be used with the seed parameter to detect backend changes.

service_tier.description: The service tier used for processing the request.
